title: Korbond Needle Pack Assorted - 110250
description: From the manufacturer NON TEAR EYELETS Needles feature sharp points and non-tear eyelets to minimise snagging during project work. Suitable for a range of fabric types and weights. MULTI USES The set of 20 Hand sewing needles are suitable for a range of sewing styles including; tailoring, Quilting, tapestry, yarn work, canvas, darning, mending and repairs LARGE PACK Pack contains 20 needles, in assorted lengths to ensure you always have the right needle for any craft project. Needle Lengths 2 needles x 3. 4cm 8 needles x 3. 8cm 6 needles x 4. 1cm 4 needles x 4. 5cm
